posts.text:
Truth.


Kyle Cheney (@kyledcheney)

Donald Trump just posted a lot of words about the Supreme Court and other courts — many of which were not true. 

1) The court did not bless his alternative tariff plan
2) The 2020 election was not “conclusively shown to be stolen
3) The court did not say Trump lacked “standing” in 2020. It said Texas did not have standing.

The rest is one of the most incendiary attacks on the court in memory.

truthsocial.com/@realDonaldT…




— https://nitter.net/kyledchen

A good day to win a winter sport! Team USA Para ice hockey takes gold, completing historic sweep for U.S. hockey across Olympic and Paralympic Games. Congrats to Team USA—including Minnesotans Liam Cunningham and Landon Uthke. 🇺🇸 🏒


NBC Olympics & Paralympics (@NBCOlympics)

USA Hockey heard it was time for some spring cleaning. 🧹🦅





— https://nitter.net/NBCOlympics/status/2033229672654262457#m

After the health care tax credits expired, 1 in 3 Americans—about 82 million people—are skipping meals, delaying care, or borrowing money just to pay medical bills.

That’s why we’ve been fighting to restore the health care tax credits, so people aren't forced to make impossible choices.

Melissa Hortman worked to create Minnesota’s Community Solar Garden Program—opening the door for more families to benefit from clean energy. The Minnesota House just passed a bill unanimously to name the program in her honor.

A fitting way to honor her legacy.

What began as a simple idea between friends 50 years ago grew into one of Duluth’s most iconic destinations. Happy 50th anniversary to Grandma’s Saloon & Grill!

duluthnewstribune.com/busine…

Congratulations to Lake Elmo’s Sydney Peterson on winning Paralympic GOLD in the women’s 10km classic standing race! 🥇🇺🇸

An incredible achievement and another proud moment for Minnesota.  

mprnews.org/story/2026/03/11…

No one serving the public should be able to use confidential government information for financial gain.

I introduced legislation with Senator Merkley to ban federal officials from trading on prediction markets and crack down on corruption.

This is not a video game. It isn’t bowling or football or golf. It is war. Our Service members are putting their lives on the line. People are dying.


The White House (@WhiteHouse)

UNDEFEATED.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/WhiteHouse/status/2032115039985881556#m

An important new U.N. investigation finds Russia’s abduction of thousands of Ukrainian children amounts to crimes against humanity.

The world must stand together to reunite these children with their families and hold those responsible accountable.

Some good news: We just passed bipartisan legislation in the Senate to build more homes, drive down costs, and to limit the number of homes private corporations can buy up over people just trying to afford the American dream.

It isn't just gas prices — everything from groceries to travel costs could cost more for Minnesotans because of this war. The Administration still has not made the case or laid out a strategic path forward.

More details on what happened in Kuwait: 

Dozens of U.S. service members in Kuwait suffered serious injuries, including burns, brain trauma and shrapnel wounds, sources say - CBS News cbsnews.com/news/strike-in-k…

Proof once again that Minnesota is the State of Hockey! 🏒


Jack Jablonski (@Jabs_13)

The Minnesota High School State Championship between Moorhead & Minnetonka had a larger attendance (19,648) than ANY NHL game on Saturday (19,070). 

This truly is my favorite stat of every hockey season. Such a testament to the fandom and support of the MN hockey community





— https://nitter.net/Jabs_13/status/2031179111318827221#m

You shouldn’t have to pay a small fortune to see your favorite artist in concert.

Instead of giving consumers the relief they deserve, this Administration settled the Live Nation/Ticketmaster case.

Fans deserve better—and I’ll keep fighting for real competition.

Video

I’m honored to have earned the support of LIUNA’s 14,000 laborers and skilled construction workers across Minnesota. From supporting infrastructure and jobs to making it easier to get skills training, my priority as Governor will be to support and expand our economy and good paying jobs in Minnesota.

I’ve worked with families and advocates at Parent Project Muscular Dystrophy for years to accelerate research and treatments for muscular dystrophy.

We’ve made real progress—but we won’t stop until every family has a cure. Grateful for this award recognizing that work.

I’ve long led bipartisan efforts to make E15 available year-round. It’s a commonsense way to decrease our reliance on foreign oil and support our farmers.

Video

St. Paul Fire Captain Mike Paidar’s life inspired our bipartisan effort to ensure families of firefighters lost to or disabled by service-related cancers get the support they deserve.

Great to be with the International Association of Fire Fighters to celebrate this victory:

Video

This settlement with Live Nation-Ticketmaster fails to lower costs, help artists, or protect fans. States should keep fighting, and I’ll be introducing legislation to stop corrupt antitrust settlements.

variety.com/2026/music/news/…

Honored to receive the Answering the Call Award from the National Emergency Number Association and proud that the Senate passed my bipartisan Enhancing First Response Act to modernize our 9-1-1 system. Now the House must take action.

grandrapidsmn.com/news/klobu…
